Okay, I will modify scripts/local/clear-anonymous-users-db.cjs to delete anonymous users directly from Firebase Authentication.

  Here's the plan for the updated script:
   1. It will initialize the Firebase Admin SDK (as it currently does).
   2. It will fetch all users from Firebase Authentication using admin.auth().listUsers().
   3. It will identify anonymous users by checking if their providerData is empty (meaning they haven't linked any identity providers like email/password, Google, etc.) and they 
      don't have an email address set.
   4. It will then use admin.auth().deleteUsers(uids) for efficient batch deletion of these identified anonymous users.
